items.summary: In `frontend/index.html`, update the JSON-LD structured data block to fix the Google Rich Results error 'Champ itemReviewed manquant'. Each `Review` object inside the `review` array of the `LocalBusiness` schema must include an `itemReviewed` property referencing the business (type `LocalBusiness`, with `name: 'VERDIER COUVERTURE'`). If an `AggregateRating` is present, ensure it is correctly nested inside the `LocalBusiness` entity. Validate that the resulting JSON-LD passes Google's Rich Results Test without the 'itemReviewed missing' error.
